channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Jon Hamm Reveals How He Really Feels About Becoming a Viral Meme (Exclusive)
item.description: The meme, a clip taken from Hamm's show, 'Your Friends & Neighbors', began going viral on TikTok last fall

item.title: TikTok Allergy Doc's Dos and Don’ts for Surviving Pollen Season: 'Make a Date With Your Nose' (Exclusive)
item.description: TikTok allergist Dr. Zachary Rubin encourages people to start preparing for spring early: "Pollen's about to mess with you"

item.title: Martin Short's Daughter Katherine Dies at 42: 'The Short Family Is Devastated by This Loss'
item.description: "It is with profound grief that we confirm the passing of Katherine Hartley Short," the family shared with PEOPLE in a statement

item.title: Lisa Rinna Says She Had to Bribe Her Kids to Film with Her When She Was on “Real Housewives of Beverly Hills”
item.description: The reality TV star shares her daughters Delilah, 27, and Amelia, 24, with husband Harry Hamlin

item.title: Kate Hudson Explains Why She's 'Done' with a Guy If They're 'Not Into' the Relationship
item.description: Kate Hudson has been engaged to her fiancé Danny Fujikawa since 2021

item.title: 'Baylen Out Loud' Star Baylen Dupree Defends John Davidson's BAFTAs Outburst
item.description: John Davidson's Tourette's tic -- which resulted in the disability activist screaming out a racial slur during an awards broadcast -- isn't necessaril...

item.title: See Photos of Lisa Rinna From Night of Alleged Drugging at 'Traitors' Premiere Party
item.description: Lisa Rinna was allegedly drugged at "The Traitors" Season 4 premiere party ... and we have photos taken throughout the night prior to her being rushed...

item.title: Meagan Good Reveals Husband Jonathan Majors Is Doing Great, Back to Work
item.description: Meagan Good is riding hard for her man Jonathan Majors ... telling us he’s officially getting his career back on track after that assault and harassme...

item.title: Dimitrius Graham Says Fractured Wrist From Arrest Cost Him $10K in Gigs
item.description: "American Idol" finalist Dimitrius Graham says his recent arrest didn’t just leave him shaken ... it left him sidelined and seriously out of pocket. D...

item.title: Martin Short's Daughter Katherine Died By Suicide
item.description: Martin Short's daughter, Katherine, has taken her own life ... TMZ has learned. The 42-year-old died from a self-inflicted gunshot wound ... law enfor...
